description: Date picker with a trigger button, dropdown calendar popup, today shortcut, clear button, and min/max date constraints. Supports custom date format and label.

examples.title: Date picker with constraints and custom format
examples.code:
<TmDatePicker @bind-Value="selectedDate"
              Label="Start date"
              DateFormat="yyyy-MM-dd"
              MinDate="@(new DateOnly(2026, 1, 1))"
              MaxDate="@(new DateOnly(2026, 12, 31))"
              Required="true" />
